term: Takes Up Two Thirds of the Movie
pronunciation: /teɪks ʌp tuː θɜːrdz əv ðə ˈmuː.vi/
englishDefinitions: Occupies or uses about two thirds of the film's length or running time.
persianTranslation: دو سومِ فیلم را در بر می‌گیرد
examples: The opening section takes up two thirds of the movie.
The character's backstory takes up two thirds of the movie.
In this version, the wedding scene takes up two thirds of the movie.
